title: Celaya, Guanajuato — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Celaya, Guanajuato: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Celaya is a city in Guanajuato with a population of 521,169. Agricultural and industrial hub in Guanajuato’s fertile Bajío region, known as the world capital of cajeta.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
